name: @tank/prisma-production-patterns
description: Production Prisma ORM patterns for TypeScript. Schema design, relations, Prisma Client CRUD, transactions, raw SQL, connection pooling, migrations, Client extensions, testing, seeding, and deployment. Triggers: prisma, prisma client, prisma schema, prisma migrate, prisma production, prisma best practices, prisma connection pooling, prisma transaction, prisma N+1, prisma testing, prisma accelerate, prisma serverless, prisma extension, prisma vs drizzle.
